prd.oneLiner: Connect vendor profiles, qualification checklists, document-expiry alerts, evaluations, and risk reporting.
prd.goal: Maintain valid required vendor documentation for 95% or more of active vendors.
prd.whyNow: Vendor profiles, certifications, and contract documents are scattered across folders, causing missed renewals and slow risk review.
prd.problem: Vendor profiles, certifications, and contract documents are scattered across folders, causing missed renewals and slow risk review.
prd.solution: Connect vendor profiles, qualification checklists, document-expiry alerts, evaluations, and risk reporting.
prd.alternatives: Email, chat, spreadsheets, and manual ledgers
prd.differentiator: Manage intake, processing, and operations data as one connected source of truth.

targets.name: Employee requesting or looking up a vendor
targets.needs: Quickly register needed work and know its status.
targets.pain: Vendor profiles, certifications, and contract documents are scattered across folders, causing missed renewals and slow risk review.

targets.name: Procurement and compliance operations coordinator
targets.needs: Manage priority and history and review operations metrics.
targets.pain: Vendor profiles, certifications, and contract documents are scattered across folders, causing missed renewals and slow risk review.

scenarios.text: Employee requesting or looking up a vendor completes vendor registration and required-document submission and checks progress.
Procurement and compliance operations coordinator reviews vendor rating, expiring-document, and risk-status reporting.

prd.northStar: Share of operations requests completed on time

kpis.name: On-time processing rate
kpis.target: Maintain valid required vendor documentation for 95% or more of active vendors.
kpis.method: Monthly aggregation of completion history against target dates

kpis.name: Operations visibility
kpis.method: Share of registered requests connected to operations reporting

inScope: Vendor profile, contract, and risk-status lookup
Qualification review, approval, re-evaluation, and document renewal
Vendor rating, expiring-document, and risk-status reporting
nonGoals: Replacing adjacent systems such as accounting or payroll
assumptions: User and organization data are available through company SSO.
Operators manage policy and classification criteria.
risks: Weak initial classification can cause incorrect processing.
Stale source data can reduce operational trust.
openQuestions: What defines urgent processing and approval?
What are the post-completion verification and reopen rules?
constraints: State, owner, and priority changes require audit logs.
